name: qa
description: Complete ISTQB-aligned QA toolkit for Web + REST API projects: 58 slash commands covering the full ISTQB body of knowledge (Foundation, Test Manager, Analyst, Technical Analyst, Agile, Automation, Performance, Security, Acceptance, Usability, AI/GenAI, Model-Based, Mobile, process improvement) using Playwright+TypeScript / K6 / Pact. Follows CTFL v4.0 and ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119-3. Driven by a single per-project qa.config.yml.
